inline_comments.message:
I was looking for usage of configurationResourceKeys (cRK) as member of eBB class - as there is not much documentation (in code) regarding contract on it.

Looks like code right now not really guarded against eBB.configurationResourceKeys == null
it will cause NPE in other parts of code.

In that case having cRK created with empty keys (so getters on cRK will return null) should not cause immediate adverse effects.
Could you please check that method had successful execution? You can do it in a separate test or here
